svg.title: Composer semantic emotion wheel picker
svg.desc: A desktop picker draft that keeps eight major emotion families, their minor shades, and weighted blended emotions together in one radial map. Longing is selected as a blend of love, sadness, and desire.

g.text: One wheel for families, shades, and blends
A semantic constellation keeps every emotion on the map and makes mixed emotional intent visible before selection.
Choose the feeling behind this song
Explore a family, choose a precise shade, or follow the bridges to a blended emotion.
Arrows move · Enter selects · Tab opens details
Color always appears with a name or shape
A sustained pull toward something loved but absent.
Tender enough for intimacy; unresolved enough to move the song.
SELECTED FROM THE MAP · PENDING CONFIRMATION
Switch to List for search, descriptions, and screen readers.
Already featured emotions remain visible but unavailable.
Family petal → minor shade or bridge → explicit weighted blend → confirmation
On narrow screens, the same taxonomy becomes family tabs + grouped cards.
